reconciliation_display_source: ECPL Axis CA | PDF statement FY 25-26 → CSV | classified by payee policy below
payee_policy: Company rent is paid only directly to Harshad Mehta. Do not book or reconcile rent against payments made only to Nakul Mehta.
Payments to Nakul Mehta (when beneficiary is Nakul, not Harshad) are reimbursements — reconcile each to expenses incurred by Nakul (company expense register, tagged CC/savings, petty, invoices).
period_note: FY 25-26 statement slice in this snapshot. Rent accrual vs paid: use Harshad-only bank lines + SW/ECPL as applicable.

lines.classification_note: NOT rent — reconcile to Nakul’s expense proofs (not Harshad rent).
Beneficiary is Harshad — counts toward rent paid (policy).

gap_note: Space Within HDFC: tag Harshad-only lines for rent; Nakul-only lines for reimbursement. Add separate JSON when exported.
